ownerReserveCustodyNote: The 300,000,000 GCA reserve is held in a normal owner-controlled wallet. It is not a lock, vesting contract, or multisig.
description: GCA is a fixed-supply ERC-20 token deployed on Base Mainnet. GCA currently stands for Go China Access, a concept-stage community direction focused on China-facing Web3 culture, creators, bilingual education, and public market narrative research. The contract creates 1,000,000,000 GCA at deployment and includes no post-deployment minting, burning, taxes, blacklist, or admin controls.
officialEmailNote: Owner-provided Gmail address for BaseScan submission.
socialLinkNote: Official Telegram was created after the initial BaseScan submission; include it in any BaseScan follow-up or future token profile correction.
